scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --packages=bundle --external:better-sqlite3 --outfile=dist/index.cjs
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @cc-switch-web/shared && tsx --test src/modules/proxy/protocol-bridge.test.ts src/modules/proxy/anthropic-sse-bridge.test.ts src/modules/proxy/provider-health-probe-service.test.ts src/modules/proxy/proxy-http-handler.test.ts src/modules/proxy/proxy-runtime-service.test.ts src/modules/proxy/usage-tracking.test.ts src/modules/audit/audit-event-service.test.ts src/modules/assets/asset-repositories.test.ts src/modules/assets/asset-version-service.test.ts src/modules/assets/skill-delivery-service.test.ts src/modules/dashboard/dashboard-bootstrap-service.test.ts src/modules/governance/config-governance-service.test.ts src/modules/host-discovery/host-discovery-service.test.ts src/modules/mcp/mcp-host-sync-service.test.ts src/modules/mcp/mcp-service.test.ts src/modules/mcp/mcp-verification-history-service.test.ts src/modules/quotas/app-quota-service.test.ts src/modules/routing/routing-governance-service.test.ts src/modules/routing/context-routing-explanation-service.test.ts src/modules/snapshots/snapshot-service.test.ts src/modules/system/metrics-service.test.ts src/modules/system/system-service.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/workspace-repositories.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/workspace-context-service.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/active-context-policy-service.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/workspace-discovery-service.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/session-governance-service.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/session-lifecycle-service.test.ts src/modules/workspaces/runtime-context-observability-service.test.ts
